label: Model registry, versioning & MLOps / LLMOps

node.label: Model registry, versioning & MLOps / LLMOps
node.definition: Model registries and MLOps systems version models, adapters, datasets, evaluations, approvals, lineage, deployment targets, and rollback state.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Model registry, versioning & MLOps / LLMOps is to connect Object storage, sharding & checkpoints, Workflow, cluster & job orchestration to downstream capabilities including Large language models.
examples: combined with Object storage, sharding & checkpoints
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Object storage, sharding & checkpoints, Workflow, cluster & job orchestration.

sentence_units.text: Model registries and MLOps systems version models, adapters, datasets, evaluations, approvals, lineage, deployment targets, and rollback state.

The role of Model registry, versioning & MLOps / LLMOps is to connect Object storage, sharding & checkpoints, Workflow, cluster & job orchestration to downstream capabilities including Large language models.
combined with Object storage, sharding & checkpoints
